event3.text: I did not touch anything. I would like that on record.
No terminals. No storage racks. Just... memory cores.

event1.title: PERSONNEL RECORD
event1.content:
NAME: DR. ETHAN HALE
STATUS: DECEASED
DATE OF DEATH: INCIDENT ALPHA
RECORD STATUS: VERIFIED

event2.text: We've been hearing him since the station came back online.

event3.text: Please tell me I'm not the only one suddenly very interested in ghosts.

event0.title: OFFICIAL DEATH RECORD
event0.content:
SUBJECT: ETHAN HALE
CONFIRMED DECEASED
AUTHORIZED BY: EVA THORNE
CAUSE: PRESSURE TRAUMA
LOCATION: SECTOR 7

event3.text: I remember thinking my hand was shaking too much to write his name.

backgroundEvent1.text: You should not have come here.

event2.text: That was him. Or whatever is wearing his voice.

event1.text: Unknown channel opened during signal loss.
The dead still speak. Because memory does not know how to die.
Something is wrong with this place. And I don't think Hale is the mystery anymore. I think Hale is just one of the things it kept.

event0.title: CORE ACCESS TERMINAL
event0.content:
MEMORY VAULT AVAILABLE
ACCESS LEVEL REQUIRED

AUTHORIZED INPUT SOURCE:
LIVING MEMORY
